title: Bitcoin’s quantum dilemma: Bigger blocks or STARK proofs?
summary: Bitcoin’s quantum dilemma: Bigger blocks or STARK proofs?
briefing: Dealing with large post quantum signatures slowing down Bitcoin can be solved with bigger blocks, or aggregating signatures using STARK proofs.

title: Hong Kong regulator orders new anti-phishing measures for crypto platforms
summary: Hong Kong regulator orders new anti-phishing measures for crypto platforms
briefing: Hong Kong’s regulator has ordered crypto platforms and online brokers to meet newly issued phishing-resistant login requirements within the next 12 months.

title: Sony Bank gets US regulator nod to issue stablecoins
summary: Sony Bank gets US regulator nod to issue stablecoins
briefing: Sony Bank received preliminary approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to establish a US stablecoin issuance business, with $40 million in starting capital.

title: Interpol operation exposes $122M crypto wallet tied to romance scam laundering
summary: Interpol operation exposes $122M crypto wallet tied to romance scam laundering
briefing: Interpol said a suspect's crypto wallet processed over $122.5 million in 10 months as authorities uncovered the scheme during a global anti-fraud operation that led to 5,811 arrests.

title: Revolut says USDT delisting is limited to EEA, Switzerland
summary: Revolut says USDT delisting is limited to EEA, Switzerland
briefing: Revolut said USDT support remains unchanged outside EEA and Switzerland as it winds down the stablecoin offering in selected European markets.

title: Hyperliquid shows how onchain perps could challenge Wall Street: Pantera
summary: Hyperliquid shows how onchain perps could challenge Wall Street: Pantera
briefing: Perpetual futures and Hyperliquid’s blockchain infrastructure are expanding into traditional asset classes with around-the-clock trading, according to Pantera Capital.

title: Bitcoin ETFs end 'most overwhelming' $2.7B sell-off amid new $85M net outflow
summary: Bitcoin ETFs end 'most overwhelming' $2.7B sell-off amid new $85M net outflow
briefing: Bitcoin spot ETFs posted a fresh net outflow on Wednesday as analysis said that their "most overwhelming" outflow streak had ended without a clear demand recovery.

title: Bank of Korea stands firm on bank-led stablecoin push as deposit token pilots advance
summary: Bank of Korea stands firm on bank-led stablecoin push as deposit token pilots advance
briefing: The Bank of Korea reiterated its call for bank-led won stablecoin issuance while advancing deposit token pilots, as issuer rules remain a sticking point in South Korea’s digital asset bill.

title: MoonPay Brings Its AI Crypto Agents to Telegram
summary: MoonPay Brings Its AI Crypto Agents to Telegram
briefing: MoonAgents lets users analyze markets and prepare crypto transactions through Telegram while keeping keys on their own devices.

title: Morning Minute: Paradigm Raises $1.2B Fund as Crypto’s Top VC Pushes Into AI
summary: Morning Minute: Paradigm Raises $1.2B Fund as Crypto’s Top VC Pushes Into AI
briefing: BNB Chain rebuilds itself for a world run by AI agents. BTC ETFs flows flip negative. And prediction markets face a new hurdle.

title: EU Set to Revise MiCA in 2027 to Cover Foreign Stablecoin Issuers
summary: EU Set to Revise MiCA in 2027 to Cover Foreign Stablecoin Issuers
briefing: Trump's embrace of stablecoins is pushing Brussels to expand its crypto law to non-EU issuers and tokenized payments, EU diplomats say.

title: Sony Bank Clears OCC Hurdle for Dollar Stablecoin
summary: Sony Bank Clears OCC Hurdle for Dollar Stablecoin
briefing: The lender's new US subsidiary, Connectia Trust, would issue a dollar-pegged stablecoin once it clears the regulator's final conditions.

title: A 20-Year-Old's Crypto Wallet Moved $123M in Romance-Scam Cash: Interpol Says
summary: A 20-Year-Old's Crypto Wallet Moved $123M in Romance-Scam Cash: Interpol Says
briefing: The two Thai arrests were part of Operation First Light, a 97-country sweep that logged 5,811 arrests and intercepted $293 million.

title: The New Grok 4.5 Is Out. Elon Musk Says It Competes With Last Year's Claude Opus
summary: The New Grok 4.5 Is Out. Elon Musk Says It Competes With Last Year's Claude Opus
briefing: SpaceXAI's new coding model is cheaper and faster than Anthropic and OpenAI's flagships—and by Musk's own account, at least one generation behind them.

title: Paradigm Raises $1.2 Billion Fund as Crypto VC Pushes Further Into AI
summary: Paradigm Raises $1.2 Billion Fund as Crypto VC Pushes Further Into AI
briefing: The investment firm said its fourth fund will back AI, robotics, and crypto startups as it broadens beyond digital assets.

title: Bitcoin Stalls as Ethereum Flashes Worst Weekly Signal in Years: Analysis
summary: Bitcoin Stalls as Ethereum Flashes Worst Weekly Signal in Years: Analysis
briefing: Bitcoin is looking slightly more optimistic but failed the breakout everyone was watching. Meanwhile, ETH just printed a weekly death cross for the first time in years.
